package rulecoverage

import (
    "encoding/xml"
)

// Positive scenario for xml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same local XML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
type envelope struct { ID string }

func PositiveXmlUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimes(payload []byte) {
    var first envelope
    var second envelope
    xml.Unmarshal(payload, &first)
    xml.Unmarshal(payload, &second)
}
